mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendship (user_id, friend_id, group_name, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{groupName}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friendship WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.select: SELECT fs.*, u.id as friend_id, u.username as friend_username, u.nickname as friend_nickname, u.avatar as friend_avatar, u.bio as friend_bio, u.role as friend_role, u.status as friend_status, u.created_at as friend_created_at, u.updated_at as friend_updated_at FROM friendship fs LEFT JOIN user u ON fs.friend_id = u.id WHERE fs.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fs.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM friendship WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.update: UPDATE friendship SET group_name = #{groupName} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
UPDATE friendship SET remark = #{remark} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
